episodes.title: Why The Alcoholics Anonymous Meeting Is Harmful | What The AA Meeting Is
episodes.description:
Why Alcoholics Anonymous Doesn't Work? Take a good look at the AA meeting. The truth about Alcoholics Anonymous nobody tells you is the meeting is toxic in every way. And the addiction recovery program fails those when they need the most help.
BOOKS FOR RECOVERY AND REINVENTION

THE SMALL BOOK: HOW I BEAT ALCOHOLISM AND WHY ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS DOESN'T WORK.
https://www.amazon.com/SMALL-BOOK-ALCOHOLISM-ALCOHOLICS-DOESNT/dp/B08VCJ4ZPT

THE SHEPHERD AND THE RUNNINGWOLF: A PATH TO FORGIVENESS ON THE PACIFIC CREST TRAIL
https://www.amazon.com/SHEPHERD-RUNNINGWOLF-Forgiveness-Pacific-Crest/dp/B08P1FCC7G

REINVENTION OF SELF: HOW TO CHANGE YOUR LIFE AND BEING FOREVER
https://www.amazon.com/REINVENTION-SELF-CHANGE-BEING-FOREVER/dp/B08PJWKXHC

To listen to the deconstruction of two long time AA members who escaped the cult check out their channels below

Quackoholics Anonymous
https://www.youtube.com/@UCcj54GbpaeqNzy4s-nQRt4g 

Kirsten--Sobriety Bestie
https://www.youtube.com/@UCWefB6bk8reofI7ZnXfPTNA

John Barleycorn taken from Jack London's book John Barleycorn. First published 1913

episodes.title: AA's Biggest Lies Start Right Here. The Truth About Bill Wilson And The Big Book.
episodes.description: This video questions the authenticity of The Big Book used in Alcoholics Anonymous meetings, suggesting it contains falsehoods. We aim to expose the first lie presented in the book's initial chapters, drawing parallels to fundamentalist religious worldviews and challenging the traditional views of Alcoholics Anonymous addiction recovery. Many ask, " is AA a cult?" and this discussion contributes to that ongoing debate. BOOKS FOR RECOVERY AND REINVENTION THE SMALL BOOK: HOW I BEAT ALCOHOLISM AND WHY ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS DOESN'T WORK. THE SHEPHERD AND THE RUNNINGWOLF: A PATH TO FORGIVENESS ON THE PACIFIC CREST TRAIL REINVENTION OF SELF: HOW TO CHANGE YOUR LIFE AND BEING FOREVER

episodes.title: Ready To Be Sober Or Not Ready To Be Sober? How Do You Know When It's Time To Quit Drinking?
episodes.description: When should you know it is time to quit drinking? This was how I knew I had to stop drinking. episodes.title: AA Is A High Control Group? The Secret Dark Side Of AA Cult. What Defines AA As A Cult?
episodes.description: Are there signs that AA is controlling more than you realize? Is AA a high control group, which is a cult? The fact is, AA is control. The image of a cult.
